rationale: Both reviews correctly block on the same decisive scope defects (Layer-6 True-placeholder classes and premature IsUnipotent before Layer 0–5 exist, confirmed in the diff at lines 49 and 57–64); the only differentiator is Review 2's bundling claim about AffineAlgGroup, which cites a README section not verifiable from the diff and that Review 1 explicitly contradicts — neither review has a confirmed edge in what the resulting PR would look like.
